hook: If chemistry is missing, forcing it usually makes both people less attractive.
body: No amount of performance can replace a genuine lack of pull, ease, or mutual interest.

hook: Some men keep escalating because they hope effort will produce the spark that reality did not offer.
body: Sometimes maturity means noticing that the fit is ordinary and letting ordinary be enough to move on.

body: A respectful ending after a flat date is stronger than trying to rescue it with bigger gestures or more intensity.
